<CONCLUSION> To make a delicious dish of Shredded Pork, you will need the following ingredients: 2 pounds of pork shoulder, 1/4 cup of soy sauce, 1/4 cup of brown sugar, 2 tablespoons of rice vinegar, 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil, 2 cloves of garlic, 1 tablespoon of grated ginger, 1 teaspoon of sesame oil, 1 teaspoon of salt, and 1/2 teaspoon of black pepper. 

First, combine the soy sauce, brown sugar, rice vinegar, vegetable oil, garlic, ginger, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl. Add the pork shoulder and mix well to coat the meat with the marinade. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.

Remove the pork from the oven and let it cool slightly. Using two forks, shred the meat into bite-sized pieces. Serve the Shredded Pork hot, garnished with chopped green onions and sesame seeds if desired. Enjoy your delicious dish of Shredded Pork. </CONCLUSION>
